appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: pytest test suite' section with test file targets, command patterns, known OK failures, and VAL-PATH-005 interpretation guidance.

notes: All 5 trade-path assertions pass. Targeted tests (71 tests) exit code 0. Full suite failures (836-848) are pre-existing concurrent execution infrastructure limitations per baseline-green.md, not new regressions. Post-trade-path runs show FEWER failures than pre-trade-path baseline (856), confirming no regressions introduced.
